A '''Dug''' was a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] had a pet [[saw-toothed grank]].
